channel.title: Cloudflare, Inc. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Cloudflare, Inc. (cloudflare).

item.title: CVE-2026-14440 · 7.6 HIGH — Cloudflare Universal SSL automatically managed CAA RRset supersedes customer-configured CAA records
item.description: Description: To issue and renew TLS certificates on behalf of customers, Cloudflare's Universal SSL feature automatically manages the CAA RRset for the customer's zone. This auto-managed RRset is permissive by design (e.g. 'issue "letsencrypt.org"' w…

item.title: CVE-2026-11941 · 5.6 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Use-after-free in connection ID iterator and FFI functions
item.description: Cloudflare Quiche was affected by 2 use-after-free vulnerabilities in the connection ID iterator FFI functions. The “quiche_connection_id_iter_next” and “quiche_conn_retired_scid_next” functions would return a pointer to a “ConnectionId” to the appli…

item.title: CVE-2026-2836 · 8.4 HIGH 🌩️ — Cache poisoning via insecure-by-default cache key
item.description: A cache poisoning vulnerability has been found in the Pingora HTTP proxy framework’s default cache key construction. The issue occurs because the default HTTP cache key implementation generates cache keys using only the URI path, excluding critical f…

item.title: CVE-2026-2835 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — HTTP Request Smuggling via HTTP/1.0 and Transfer-Encoding Misparsing
item.description: An HTTP Request Smuggling vulnerability (CWE-444) has been found in Pingora's parsing of HTTP/1.0 and Transfer-Encoding requests. The issue occurs due to improperly allowing HTTP/1.0 request bodies to be close-delimited and incorrect handling of mult…

item.title: CVE-2026-2833 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — HTTP Request Smuggling via Premature Upgrade
item.description: An HTTP request smuggling vulnerability (CWE-444) was found in Pingora's handling of HTTP/1.1 connection upgrades. The issue occurs when a Pingora proxy reads a request containing an Upgrade header, causing the proxy to pass through the rest of the b…

item.title: CVE-2026-3125 · 7.7 HIGH 🌩️ — SSRF vulnerability in opennextjs-cloudflare via /cdn-cgi/ path normalization bypass
item.description: A Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability was identified in the @opennextjs/cloudflare package, resulting from a path normalization bypass in the /cdn-cgi/image/ handler.The @opennextjs/cloudflare worker template includes a /cdn-cgi/image/ h…

item.title: CVE-2026-1229 · 2.9 LOW 🌩️ — Incorrect calculation in CIRCL secp384r1 CombinedMult
item.description: The CombinedMult function in the CIRCL ecc/p384 package (secp384r1 curve) produces an incorrect value for specific inputs. The issue is fixed by using complete addition formulas. ECDH and ECDSA signing relying on this curve are not affected. The bug…

item.title: CVE-2026-1721 · 6.2 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Reflected Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability in AI Playground site
item.description: Summary A Reflected Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability was discovered in the AI Playground's OAuth callback handler. The `error_description` query parameter was directly interpolated into an HTML script tag without proper escaping, allowing att…

item.title: CVE-2026-1664 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Insecure Direct Object Reference (IDOR) via Header-Based Email Routing
item.description: Summary An Insecure Direct Object Reference has been found to exist in `createHeaderBasedEmailResolver()` function within the Cloudflare Agents SDK. The issue occurs because the `Message-ID` and `References` headers are parsed to derive the target ag…

item.title: CVE-2026-0933 · 7.7 HIGH — OS Command Injection in `wrangler pages deploy`
item.description: SummaryA command injection vulnerability (CWE-78) has been found to exist in the `wrangler pages deploy` command. The issue occurs because the `--commit-hash` parameter is passed directly to a shell command without proper validation or sanitization,…

item.title: CVE-2025-13353 · 7.1 HIGH — gokey allows secret recovery from a seed file without the master password
item.description: In gokey versions <0.2.0, a flaw in the seed decryption logic resulted in passwords incorrectly being derived solely from the initial vector and the AES-GCM authentication tag of the key seed. This issue has been fixed in gokey version 0.2.0. This is…

item.title: CVE-2025-7054 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Infinite loop triggered by connection ID retirement
item.description: Cloudflare quiche was discovered to be vulnerable to an infinite loop when sending packets containing RETIRE_CONNECTION_ID frames. QUIC connections possess a set of connection identifiers (IDs); see Section 5.1 of RFC 9000 https://datatracker.ietf.or…

item.title: CVE-2025-4821 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Incorrect congestion window growth by invalid ACK ranges
item.description: Impact Cloudflare quiche was discovered to be vulnerable to incorrect congestion window growth, which could cause it to send data at a rate faster than the path might actually support. An unauthenticated remote attacker can exploit the vulnerability…

item.title: CVE-2025-4820 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Incorrect congestion window growth by optimistic ACK
item.description: Impact Cloudflare quiche was discovered to be vulnerable to incorrect congestion window growth, which could cause it to send data at a rate faster than the path might actually support. An unauthenticated remote attacker can exploit the vulnerability…

item.title: CVE-2025-6087 · 7.8 HIGH 🌩️ — SSRF vulnerability in opennextjs-cloudflare via /_next/image endpoint
item.description: A Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability was identified in the @opennextjs/cloudflare package. The vulnerability stems from an unimplemented feature in the Cloudflare adapter for Open Next, which allowed unauthenticated users to proxy arbit…

item.title: CVE-2025-4366 · 7.4 HIGH 🌩️ — Request Smuggling Vulnerability in Pingora
item.description: A request smuggling vulnerability identified within Pingora’s proxying framework, pingora-proxy, allows malicious HTTP requests to be injected via manipulated request bodies on cache HITs, leading to unauthorized request execution and potential cache…

item.title: CVE-2025-4658 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Authentication Bypass in OPKSSH
item.description: Versions of OpenPubkey library prior to 0.10.0 contained a vulnerability that would allow a specially crafted JWS to bypass signature verification. As OPKSSH depends on the OpenPubkey library for authentication, this vulnerability in OpenPubkey also…

item.title: CVE-2025-3757 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Authentication Bypass in OpenPubKey
item.description: Versions of OpenPubkey library prior to 0.10.0 contained a vulnerability that would allow a specially crafted JWS to bypass signature verification.

item.title: CVE-2025-4144 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — PKCE bypass via downgrade attack
item.description: PKCE was implemented in the OAuth implementation in workers-oauth-provider that is part of MCP framework https://github.com/cloudflare/workers-mcp . However, it was found that an attacker could cause the check to be skipped. Fixed in: https://github.…

item.title: CVE-2025-4143 · 6 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Missing validation of redirect_uri on authorize endpoint
item.description: The OAuth implementation in workers-oauth-provider that is part of MCP framework https://github.com/cloudflare/workers-mcp , did not correctly validate that redirect_uri was on the allowed list of redirect URIs for the given client registration. Fixe…

item.title: CVE-2021-3978 · 7.5 HIGH — Improper Preservation of Permissions in github.com/cloudflare/cfrpki/cmd/octorpki
item.description: When copying files with rsync, octorpki uses the "-a" flag 0, which forces rsync to copy binaries with the suid bit set as root. Since the provided service definition defaults to root ( https://github.com/cloudflare/cfrpki/blob/master/package/octorpk…

item.title: CVE-2025-0651 · 6.1 MEDIUM — File symlink abuse might lead to deleting files belonging to SYSTEM user
item.description: Improper Privilege Management vulnerability in Cloudflare WARP on Windows allows File Manipulation. User with a low system privileges can create a set of symlinks inside the C:\ProgramData\Cloudflare\warp-diag-partials folder. After triggering the 'R…

item.title: CVE-2024-1410 · 3.7 LOW 🌩️ — Unbounded storage of information related to connection ID retirement, in quiche
item.description: Cloudflare quiche was discovered to be vulnerable to unbounded storage of information related to connection ID retirement, which could lead to excessive resource consumption. Each QUIC connection possesses a set of connection Identifiers (IDs); see R…

item.title: CVE-2024-1765 · 5.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Unlimited resource allocation by QUIC CRYPTO frames flooding in quiche
item.description: Cloudflare Quiche (through version 0.19.1/0.20.0) was affected by an unlimited resource allocation vulnerability causing rapid increase of memory usage of the system running quiche server or client. A remote attacker could take advantage of this vuln…

item.title: CVE-2024-0212 · 8.1 HIGH — Cloudflare WordPress plugin enables information disclosure of Cloudflare API (for low privileged users)
item.description: The Cloudflare Wordpress plugin was found to be vulnerable to improper authentication. The vulnerability enables attackers with a lower privileged account to access data from the Cloudflare API.

item.title: CVE-2023-6992 · 4 MEDIUM — Memory corruption issues is Cloudflare zlib implementation
item.description: Cloudflare version of zlib library was found to be vulnerable to memory corruption issues affecting the deflation algorithm implementation (deflate.c). The issues resulted from improper input validation and heap-based buffer overflow. A local attacke…

item.title: CVE-2023-7080 · 8.5 HIGH — Arbitrary remote code execution within wrangler dev Workers sandbox
item.description: The V8 inspector intentionally allows arbitrary code execution within the Workers sandbox for debugging. wrangler dev would previously start an inspector server listening on all network interfaces. This would allow an attacker on the local network to…

item.title: CVE-2023-7079 · 6.4 MEDIUM — Arbitrary remote file read in Wrangler dev server
item.description: Sending specially crafted HTTP requests and inspector messages to Wrangler's dev server could result in any file on the user's computer being accessible over the local network. An attacker that could trick any user on the local network into opening a…

item.title: CVE-2023-7078 · 7.5 HIGH — Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) in Miniflare
item.description: Sending specially crafted HTTP requests to Miniflare's server could result in arbitrary HTTP and WebSocket requests being sent from the server. If Miniflare was configured to listen on external network interfaces (as was the default in wrangler until…

item.title: CVE-2023-6193 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Unbounded queuing of path validation messages in cloudflare-quiche
item.description: quiche v. 0.15.0 through 0.19.0 was discovered to be vulnerable to unbounded queuing of path validation messages, which could lead to excessive resource consumption. QUIC path validation (RFC 9000 Section 8.2) requires that the recipient of a PATH_CH…

item.title: CVE-2023-6180 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Resource exhaustion via memory leak in tokio-boring
item.description: The tokio-boring library in version 4.0.0 is affected by a memory leak issue that can lead to excessive resource consumption and potential DoS by resource exhaustion. The set_ex_data function used by the library did not deallocate memory used by pre-…

item.title: CVE-2023-3747 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Insufficient Validation on Override Codes for Always-Enabled WARP Mode
item.description: Zero Trust Administrators have the ability to disallow end users from disabling WARP on their devices. Override codes can also be created by the Administrators to allow a device to temporarily be disconnected from WARP, however, due to lack of server…

item.title: CVE-2023-0654 · 3.9 LOW — Spoofing User's Activity Loads in WARP Mobile Client (Android)
item.description: Due to a misconfiguration, the WARP Mobile Client (< 6.29) for Android was susceptible to a tapjacking attack. In the event that an attacker built a malicious application and managed to install it on a victim's device, the attacker would be able to t…

item.title: CVE-2023-0238 · 3.9 LOW — Injecting Activity Loads in WARP Mobile Client
item.description: Due to lack of a security policy, the WARP Mobile Client (<=6.29) for Android was susceptible to this vulnerability which allowed a malicious app installed on a victim's device to exploit a peculiarity in an Android function, wherein under certain co…

item.title: CVE-2023-4241 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — lol-html panics on certain HTML inputs
item.description: lol-html can cause panics on certain HTML inputs. Anyone processing arbitrary 3rd party HTML with the library is affected.

item.title: CVE-2023-2754 · 7.4 HIGH 🌩️ — Plaintext transmission of DNS requests in Windows 1.1.1.1 WARP client
item.description: The Cloudflare WARP client for Windows assigns loopback IPv4 addresses for the DNS Servers, since WARP acts as local DNS server that performs DNS queries in a secure manner, however, if a user is connected to WARP over an IPv6-capable network, te WAR…

item.title: CVE-2023-3766 · 5.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Invalid Slice Split Results in Server Panic
item.description: A vulnerability was discovered in the odoh-rs rust crate that stems from faulty logic during the parsing of encrypted queries. This issue specifically occurs when processing encrypted query data received from remote clients and enables an attacker wi…

item.title: CVE-2023-3348 · 5.7 MEDIUM — Directory traversal vulnerability in Cloudflare Wrangler
item.description: The Wrangler command line tool (<=wrangler@3.1.0 or <=wrangler@2.20.1) was affected by a directory traversal vulnerability when running a local development server for Pages (wrangler pages dev command). This vulnerability enabled an attacker in the s…

item.title: CVE-2023-1862 · 7.3 HIGH 🌩️ — Remote access to warp-svc.exe in Cloudflare WARP
item.description: Cloudflare WARP client for Windows (up to v2023.3.381.0) allowed a malicious actor to remotely access the warp-svc.exe binary due to an insufficient access control policy on an IPC Named Pipe. This would have enabled an attacker to trigger WARP conne…

item.title: CVE-2023-3040 · 3.7 LOW 🌩️ — Out of Bounds Access Leading to Undefined Behavior
item.description: A debug function in the lua-resty-json package, up to commit id 3ef9492bd3a44d9e51301d6adc3cd1789c8f534a (merged in PR #14) contained an out of bounds access bug that could have allowed an attacker to launch a DoS if the function was used to parse un…

item.title: CVE-2023-3036 · 8.6 HIGH 🌩️ — Out of Bounds Slice index in cfnts leads to remote panic
item.description: An unchecked read in NTP server in github.com/cloudflare/cfnts prior to commit 783490b https://github.com/cloudflare/cfnts/commit/783490b913f05e508a492cd7b02e3c4ec2297b71 enabled a remote attacker to trigger a panic by sending an NTSAuthenticator pac…

item.title: CVE-2023-2512 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Buffer under-read in workerd
item.description: Prior to version v1.20230419.0, the FormData API implementation was subject to an integer overflow. If a FormData instance contained more than 2^31 elements, the forEach() method could end up reading from the wrong location in memory while iterating…

item.title: CVE-2023-1732 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Improper random reading in CIRCL
item.description: When sampling randomness for a shared secret, the implementation of Kyber and FrodoKEM, did not check whether crypto/rand.Read() returns an error. In rare deployment cases (error thrown by the Read() function), this could lead to a predictable shared…

item.title: CVE-2023-0652 · 7 HIGH — Local Privilege Escalation in Cloudflare WARP Installer (Windows)
item.description: Due to a hardlink created in the ProgramData folder during the repair process of the software, the installer (MSI) of WARP Client for Windows (<= 2022.12.582.0) allowed a malicious attacker to forge the destination of the hardlink and escalate privil…

item.title: CVE-2023-1412 · 7 HIGH — Local Privilege Escalation Vulnerability in WARP's MSI Installer
item.description: An unprivileged (non-admin) user can exploit an Improper Access Control vulnerability in the Cloudflare WARP Client for Windows (<= 2022.12.582.0) to perform privileged operations with SYSTEM context by working with a combination of opportunistic loc…

item.title: CVE-2023-1314 · 7.5 HIGH — Local Privilege Escalation Vulnerability in cloudflared's Installer
item.description: A vulnerability has been discovered in cloudflared's installer (<= 2023.3.0) for Windows 32-bits devices that allows a local attacker with no administrative permissions to escalate their privileges on the affected device. This vulnerability exists be…

item.title: CVE-2022-4428 · 8.9 HIGH — support_uri validation missing in WARP client for Windows
item.description: support_uri parameter in the WARP client local settings file (mdm.xml) lacked proper validation which allowed for privilege escalation and launching an arbitrary executable on the local machine upon clicking on the "Send feedback" option. An attacker…

item.title: CVE-2022-4457 · 5.5 MEDIUM — WARP client manifest misconfiguration leading to Task Hijacking
item.description: Due to a misconfiguration in the manifest file of the WARP client for Android, it was possible to a perform a task hijacking attack. An attacker could create a malicious mobile application which could hijack legitimate app and steal potentially sensi…

item.title: CVE-2022-3320 · 6.7 MEDIUM — Bypassing Cloudflare Zero Trust policies using warp-cli set-custom-endpoint command
item.description: It was possible to bypass policies configured for Zero Trust Secure Web Gateway by using warp-cli 'set-custom-endpoint' subcommand. Using this command with an unreachable endpoint caused the WARP Client to disconnect and allowed bypassing administrat…

item.title: CVE-2022-3322 · 6.7 MEDIUM — Lock WARP switch bypass on WARP mobile client using iOS quick action
item.description: Lock Warp switch is a feature of Zero Trust platform which, when enabled, prevents users of enrolled devices from disabling WARP client. Due to insufficient policy verification by WARP iOS client, this feature could be bypassed by using the "Disable…
